temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A woman with long, dark hair, wearing a blue sweatshirt, struggles to lock a white paneled door. She holds a large kitchen knife in her right hand and pushes a small child, wearing a red and green striped sweater, behind her. The child's small hand reaches for the doorknob. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and dangerous situation, showing a mother and child trying to secure themselves from an unseen threat.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, frantic banging sounds are heard, along with the rattling of the doorknob and a tense, low-frequency musical score.)
(00:03-00:05) A man with long, dark hair and a menacing expression runs down a hallway. He is wearing a red robe and is brandishing a large, two-handed axe. He screams as he charges forward, swinging the axe violently against the wall next to a closed door. (Storyline: The antagonist is introduced in a full display of aggression, confirming he is the source of the banging and is actively trying to break into the house.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The man lets out a guttural scream, followed by the loud, sharp clang of the axe hitting the wall. The tense score continues.)
